description: Phase 3 receipt — all 4 modules selected, no founding member

values.moduleList:
• Site + hosting

  • Enquiry form (emails hit your inbox without exposing your address)

expected.subject: Intake received — your fee summary
expected.body:
Hi Sam,

Thanks for completing the intake form.

What you'll get:
  • Site + hosting
  • Online booking (Cal.com integration with your branding)
  • Enquiry form (emails hit your inbox without exposing your address)
  • Newsletter (send up to 1000 emails/month from name@yourdomain)
  • Google Business Profile setup + live reviews on your site (I'll claim your listing, embed it, and refresh your top reviews automatically)

Pricing:
  Setup (one-off):  £275
  Monthly:          £35/mo

What happens next: in a moment you'll get a second email with
your onboarding hub link. The hub walks you through 4-5 short
steps (~30 minutes total) to set up your Cloudflare account,
your domain, your brand assets, and pick a launch date.

I'll handle everything technical from there — DNS, hosting, TLS,
sender domain setup, the lot. You'll get an email each time I
make progress.

— Ben
